name: Gianni Infantino
quote: We are here to celebrate. The world is here. Football is here. This is the greatest World Cup in the history of football.

name: Donald Trump
role: President of the United States (Host Nation)
quote: This is going to be the greatest World Cup ever, maybe the greatest sporting event in the history of the world. No country could do it like we do it.

name: Claudia Sheinbaum
quote: Mexico is proud to welcome the world for the third time. We will show the beauty, the passion, and the warmth of our country to every fan who visits.

name: Mark Carney
quote: It is the number one sport for Canadian boys and girls. Two-thirds of the country watched the last World Cup and we are partnered with the United States and Mexico, welcoming the world.

name: Victor Montagliani
quote: The 2026 World Cup in North America will be the most transformational event in the history of our confederation. We are ready to show the world what this region can do.

name: Cindy Parlow Cone
quote: The World Cup coming to the United States is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to grow the game across our country. Our federation has never been better prepared.

name: Mauricio Pochettino
quote: Our players are ready to make the United States proud on home soil. We have been preparing for this moment since I arrived. The atmosphere will be incredible.

name: Jesús Gutiérrez
quote: We are committed to delivering a world-class experience for all fans. Mexico has hosted the World Cup twice and we know what it takes to do it right.

name: Nick Bontis
quote: This World Cup will be a transformational moment for football in Canada, inspiring the next generation of players and proving that Canada belongs on the world stage.

name: Jamil Dakwar
role: ACLU Human Rights Director (Civil Liberties Advocate)
quote: The Trump administration has aggressively pursued a systematic anti-human rights campaign to target, detain, and disappear immigrants in communities across the US — including the deployment of the National Guard in cities where the World Cup will take place.

name: Lionel Messi
role: Argentina Captain / Inter Miami CF Forward
quote: To play the World Cup in the country where I now call home — and to defend our title — would be something very special. Argentina will be ready.

name: Kylian Mbappé
quote: France comes with the ambition to win. We have a complete squad, experienced players, and the hunger to bring the trophy back to Paris.

name: Javier Mascherano
quote: Argentina comes to defend the title. Our team has the quality and the hunger to compete at the highest level. We believe in this group.

name: Thomas Tuchel
quote: We have a young, talented squad. This World Cup gives us the opportunity to finally bring football home, and I believe this group has what it takes.

name: Didier Deschamps
quote: We prepare meticulously for every tournament. The expanded format changes some dynamics, but France's goal is always the same: to win.
